Enable the aperture-illumination A term for AWProject
documentation.details: An explicit false value disables the aperture term; it is never silently rewritten to another gridder.
auto selects the managed plan-keyed cache; an explicit directory imports or reuses a CASA-compatible cache without changing its scientific identity.

documentation.summary: Maximum resident AW convolution-function pixels in MiB
documentation.details: This bounds the shared CF LRU and does not copy a full cache per worker.

documentation.summary: AW convolution-function parallactic-angle computation step in degrees
Enable conjugate-beam frequency mapping for wideband AWProject

documentation.details: Unsupported facet layouts fail with a capability diagnostic instead of being reduced to one facet.
auto selects only a correctness-qualified precision and records eligibility or fallback reasons.

documentation.summary: Optional shared imaging memory target in MiB
documentation.details: none delegates the bounded choice to the immutable execution planner. An explicit target is honored as the operator-selected process budget even when it exceeds the kernel's immediately available pages, permitting deliberate swap-backed runs with resource telemetry.

documentation.summary: Optional source-stream preparation buffer in MiB
documentation.details: none lets the shared planner derive the buffer from the memory target.
none delegates worker selection to the memory-aware execution planner.
This is an advanced reproducibility control; none uses the plan-derived row block.

documentation.summary: Comma-separated AW pointing grouping/refresh thresholds; non-pairs use CASA 600,600
documentation.details: The backend requires finite non-negative values and preserves the requested list. With usepointing=true, CASA uses the two values as the antenna-grouping and group-refresh thresholds in arcseconds; any request whose length is not exactly two, including the default 0, has the effective CASA value 600,600.

documentation.summary: Optional distinct AWProject PSF phase center
documentation.details: none reuses the image phase center; unsupported distinct centers fail explicitly.

documentation.summary: Sky projection used for the image direction coordinate
documentation.details: The current production imager supports SIN; other projections fail explicitly rather than being treated as SIN.

documentation.summary: Enable the prolate-spheroidal term inside AW convolution functions
AW convolution-function parallactic-angle rotation step in degrees
Optional CASA voltage-pattern table for AWProject
Whether to run the imaging stage.
